title: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS418-8P-8G-2S+5axQ2axQ-RM
description: The MikroTik CRS418-8P-8G-2S+RM is a modern combination of a switch and router in one compact design, suitable for installation in a 1U rack cabinet or for use as a desktop device . High performance is ensured by a quad-core ARM IPQ-8072A processor running at 2.2 GHz , complemented by 1 GB of RAM and 128 MB of NAND storage The device is equipped with (16) Gigabit Ethernet ports , of which (8) ports support PoE Out (802.3af/at) , allowing you to connect and power additional network devices such as IP cameras and access points . It also includes (1) Gigabit management port and (1) RJ45 console port for local management and configuration. Additionally, it features (2) SFP+ slots for optical modules with speeds up to 10 Gbps The integrated dual-band Wi-Fi 6 (4Ã4 MIMO) module provides fast and reliable wireless connectivity, with data rates up to 1148 Mbps in the 2.4 GHz band and up to 2400 Mbps in the 5 GHz band For increased power redundancy, the device is equipped with (2) independent power supplies . Efficient cooling is ensured by (4) internal fans , and the device also includes a USB 3.0 port for connecting external storage devices such as a flash drive High performance: CPU Quad-Core IPQ-8072A 2208 MHz, ARM 64bit, 1 GB RAM, DDR3 WiFi: 4Ã4 MIMO dual-band Wi-Fi 6, wireless 2.4 GHz up to 1148 Mbps and 5 GHz up to 2400 Mbps Optical modules: (2) SFP+ 10 Gbps Connectivity: (8) Gigabit LAN ports, (8) Gigabit LAN PoE-Out (802.3af/at) ports, (1) RJ45 console port and (1) Gigabit management port USB connection: (1) USB 3.0 port Internal storage capacity: 128 MB NAND Power…
